---
title: "BVD2 Efficacy (2024 Individual Data)"
author: "Olivia Rippee"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(epitools)
library(flextable)
```

```{r data}

individual_data <- read.csv("your_individual_data.csv") 

individual_data <-  na.omit(individual_data) %>%
  mutate(group = recode(group, `1` = "Control", `2` = "Vaccine"))

```

```{r fxn}

# P-value formatting function
# ----------------------------
format_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return(NA_character_)
  if (p < 0.0001) {
    output <- "< 0.0001"
  } else {output <- sprintf("%.4f", p)}}


# 5-number summary formatting function
# -------------------------------------
format_integer <- function(x) {
  ifelse(x %% 1 == 0,
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 0),
    formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2))}


# Prevented fraction analysis
# ----------------------------
run_prevented_fraction_analysis <- function(data, outcome_var, label_col_name) {
  outcome_sym <- sym(outcome_var)
  
  summary_counts <- data %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    summarize(
      Positive = sum(toupper(!!outcome_sym) == "YES"),
      Total = n(),
      Prop = Positive / Total,
      .groups = "drop")
  
  # Contingency table
  ct <- table(data$group, data[[outcome_var]])
  
  # Relative risk
  RR_result <- riskratio(ct, method = "boot")
  
  RR_estimate <- RR_result$measure[, "estimate"]
  RR_upper    <- RR_result$measure[, "upper"]
  fisher_p    <- RR_result$p.value[, "fisher.exact"]
  
  # Prevented Fraction
  PF_vac       <- 1 - RR_estimate[2]
  Lower_CI_vac <- ifelse(PF_vac == 1, "Not estimable", 1 - RR_upper[2])
  
  # Build summary table
  summary_table <- summary_counts %>%
    arrange(group) %>%
    mutate(
      `Treatment Group` = ifelse(group == "Control", "1 = Control", "2 = Vaccine"),
      !!label_col_name :=
        paste0(Positive, " / ", Total, " = ", sprintf("%.2f", Prop)),
      `Prevented Fraction` =
        ifelse(group == "Control", sprintf("%.2f", PF_vac), ""),
      `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` =
        ifelse(group == "Control",
               ifelse(!is.na(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(Lower_CI_vac))),
                      sprintf("%.2f", as.numeric(Lower_CI_vac)),
                      Lower_CI_vac), ""),
      `Fisher Exact p-value` =
        ifelse(group == "Control", format_p(fisher_p[2]), "")) %>%
    select(
      `Treatment Group`,
      !!label_col_name,
      `Prevented Fraction`,
      `Lower 95% Confidence Bound`,
      `Fisher Exact p-value`)
  
  return(summary_table)}


# Format flextable
#-------------------
format_flextable <- function(summary_table, caption_text) {
  flextable(summary_table) %>%
    set_caption(caption_text) %>%
    autofit() %>%
    align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
    fit_to_width(max_width = 7) %>%
    fontsize(size = 11, part = "all")}

```

# Mortality

```{r mortality}

mortality_table <- run_prevented_fraction_analysis(
  data = individual_data, outcome_var = "mortality", 
  label_col_name = "Proportion of Mortality")

format_flextable(mortality_table, "Incidence of Mortality")

```

<br>

# Leukopenia

```{r leukopenia}

leukopenia_table <- run_prevented_fraction_analysis(
  data = individual_data, outcome_var = "leukopenia", 
  label_col_name = "Proportion of Positive Cases")

format_flextable(leukopenia_table, "Incidence of Leukopenia")

```
